examples.exam_en: The lawyer questioned the suspect's true intent.
The judge ruled that he acted with criminal intent.
examples.exam_ko: 판사는 그가 범의를 가지고 행동했다고 판결했다.

examples.exam_en: She seems intent on finishing the project alone.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 혼자 프로젝트를 끝내려는 의지가 강한 것 같다.

examples.exam_en: The teacher tried to enlighten the ignorant students.
His lecture greatly enlightened the audience.
There were complications following the surgery.
The soup had a strong smack of garlic.
examples.exam_ko: 그 수프에는 마늘의 강한 맛이 났다.

examples.exam_en: There is a smack of arrogance in his tone.
He drove a stake into the ground.
The heretic was burnt at the stake.
The politician struggled to gain credibility with voters.
examples.exam_ko: 그 정치인은 유권자들의 신뢰를 얻으려 애썼다.

examples.exam_en: A convicted felon cannot vote in some states.
examples.exam_ko: 유죄 판결을 받은 중죄인은 일부 주에서 투표할 수 없다.

examples.exam_en: He was exonerated from the charge of theft.
She was exonerated from the payment obligation.
He had a heated altercation with his neighbor.
He rammed his head against the post.
She rammed a stake into the earth.
The prosecutor charged the defendant with fraud.
The lawyer worked hard to defend the defendant.
examples.exam_ko: 변호사는 피고를 변호하기 위해 열심히 일했다.

examples.exam_en: She used all her powers of persuasion to convince him.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 그를 설득하기 위해 모든 설득력을 동원했다.

examples.exam_en: They hold a different political persuasion.
examples.exam_ko: 그들은 다른 정치적 신조를 가지고 있다.

examples.exam_en: Effective persuasion is a valuable skill in relationships.
He began to rant and rave about the unfair decision.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 불공평한 결정에 대해 고함치며 난리를 피웠다.

examples.exam_en: The patient raved in a high fever all night.
examples.exam_ko: 환자는 밤새 고열에 들떠 헛소리를 했다.

examples.exam_en: They prepared a contingency plan for emergencies.
examples.exam_ko: 그들은 비상사태를 위한 비상 계획을 준비했다.

examples.exam_en: We must be prepared for all contingencies.
examples.exam_ko: 우리는 모든 돌발 사태에 대비해야 한다.

examples.exam_en: This discovery transcends the limits of human knowledge.
examples.exam_ko: 이 발견은 인간 지식의 한계를 초월한다.

examples.exam_en: She participates in many extracurricular activities after school.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 방과 후 많은 과외 활동에 참여한다.

examples.exam_en: His jaw tingled with the blow.
Her skin tingled with excitement.
Weeds of this strain propagate themselves rapidly.
They started a newspaper to propagate their ideas.
examples.exam_ko: 그들은 자신들의 사상을 전파하기 위해 신문사를 세웠다.

examples.exam_en: She recited a modern lyrical verse in class.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 수업에서 현대 서정 시를 낭송했다.

examples.exam_en: He enjoys reading contemporary verse in his spare time.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 여가 시간에 현대 시를 즐겨 읽는다.

examples.exam_en: The ambassador was addressed as Your Excellency.
His Excellency arrived at the ceremony on time.
